purpose: Probe whether the direct forced-close exception line from the same Hadoop incident can sustain a usable control-link slot without collapsing the baselines.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-18 21:37:18,951 INFO [Socket Reader #1 for port 20324] org.apache.hadoop.ipc.Server: Socket Reader #1 for port 20324: readAndProcess from client 10.86.169.121 threw exception [java.io.IOException: An existing connection was forcibly closed by the remote host]
Hadoop.eligibility_note: Direct forced-close anchor for the same worker-RPC disruption incident. This is a red-team probe to determine whether the action slot is salvageable at all.
